director.tagline_zh: 遊戲廣告 × 商業影像導演，鏡頭深耕台灣與東南亞市場
director.tagline_en: Game Ad & Commercial Film Director — Rooted in Taiwan, Reaching Southeast Asia
director.bio_zh: 鄭又勛（York）是台灣的遊戲廣告與商業影像導演，同時是曜境影像製作工作室創辦人。9 年來執導超過 88 個案子、產出逾 1000 支影音交付物，客戶橫跨 Schick舒適牌、王品集團、GODIVA、Google Play、茶裏王等消費品牌，以及斗羅大陸、仙境傳說：曙光、魔靈召喚、失落的方舟等國際知名遊戲 IP。近年深耕台灣與東南亞遊戲市場，斗羅大陸：獵魂世界一案更延伸至泰國、越南實際發行規模，從創意腳本、拍攝執行到跨市場投放策略皆一手包辦。
director.bio_en: York Cheng is a Taiwan-based director specializing in game advertising and commercial film, and the founder of Yao Jing Image Production Studio (registered in Taiwan). Over 9 years, he has directed 88+ projects and delivered 1,000+ final video assets for clients spanning consumer brands — Schick, Wang Steak Group, GODIVA, Google Play, and Tea's Tea — alongside internationally recognized game IPs including Soul Land, Ragnarok Online, Summoners War, and Lost Ark. In recent years his work has deepened into the Taiwan and Southeast Asian gaming market, with Soul Land: World of Soul Hunters extending into real campaign distribution across Thailand and Vietnam — spanning creative scripting, production, and cross-market media strategy.

works.title_zh: 舒適牌 Schick HydroPRO 磁浮刮鬍刀 OTV
works.desc_zh: 為國際刮鬍刀品牌 Schick 執導的電視廣告，完整走過腳本、PPM、定裝到拍攝的商業製作流程。
works.desc_en: A commercial TVC for international razor brand Schick, taken through the full production pipeline from script and PPM to costume fitting and shoot.

works.views_note: 官方頻道查無 2026 新案公開版本；導演個人頻道曾上傳「壹之型/貳之型/參之型」存檔版但為非公開列出（unlisted），無公開網址可查，available on request
works.views_note_en: No public 2026 version found on the official channel; the director's personal channel once hosted archived cuts ("Type I / II / III") but they are unlisted with no public URL — available on request
works.desc_zh: 為王品集團新餐飲品牌「肉次方」執導的品牌廣告。
works.desc_en: A brand commercial directed for Wang Steak Group's new dining concept, Rou Ci Fang.

works.views_note: 官方頻道與導演個人頻道皆查無 2025 新案公開版本，available on request
works.views_note_en: No public 2025 version found on either the official channel or the director's personal channel — available on request
works.desc_zh: 為國際巧克力品牌 GODIVA 執導的品牌影片。
works.desc_en: A brand film directed for international chocolate label GODIVA.

works.title_zh: Google Play 台灣廣告《就差一點》
works.desc_zh: 為 Google Play 台灣執導的品牌廣告《就差一點》，官方頻道累積超過 42 萬觀看。
works.desc_en: Directed the Google Play Taiwan brand campaign "So Close," which has drawn over 420K views on the official YouTube channel.

works.desc_zh: 為知名飲料品牌茶裏王執導《客棧圍攻篇》，官方頻道累積近 200 萬觀看。
works.desc_en: Directed "Inn Siege," a spot for popular tea brand Tea's Tea that has drawn nearly 2 million views on its official channel.

works.title_en: Soul Land: World of Soul Hunters
works.client_en: Soul Land: World of Soul Hunters
works.views_note: 原配對為官方頻道無代言人的通用 PV（l6HfuzRfLO0，36.6萬觀看），與導演頻道實際案件（高燃集結篇/斗羅時空篇，代言人：汪東城、辰亦儒、曾沛慈、張皓明）不符。已改用官方頻道同代言人陣容版本（終極一班跨時空集結篇，20.8萬觀看），與導演頻道說明欄代言人確認一致
works.views_note_en: The original match was a generic official-channel PV with no endorsers (l6HfuzRfLO0, 366K views), which didn't match the director channel's actual case (endorsers Jiro Wang, Calvin Chen, Pets Tseng, and Chang Hao-Ming). Replaced with the official-channel version featuring the same endorser lineup (208K views), consistent with the endorsers confirmed in the director channel's description
works.desc_zh: 為知名 IP《斗羅大陸：獵魂世界》執導代言廣告，由終極一班班底汪東城、辰亦儒、曾沛慈、張皓明代言，案件實際延伸至泰國、越南市場發行規模。
works.desc_en: Directed the endorsement campaign for the major game IP Soul Land: World of Soul Hunters, featuring KO ONE cast members Jiro Wang, Calvin Chen, Pets Tseng, and Chang Hao-Ming, with the campaign extending into real distribution across Thailand and Vietnam.

works.title_zh: RO仙境傳說：初心之戰《律師篇》
works.client: RO 仙境傳說：初心之戰
works.views_note: 原配對案名誤植為「曙光」，鄭又勛導演作品頻道實際收錄的是《RO仙境傳說：初心之戰》（醫師篇/教授篇/律師篇三支），查無「曙光」。已改為官方頻道（GRAVITY COMMUNICATIONS）同案「律師篇_15秒」版本，與導演頻道律師篇（9uJV8x3Foq4，導演:鄭又勛）標題一致確認
works.views_note_en: The original pairing mislabeled the case as "Dawn"; the director's own channel actually lists Ragnarok Online: The First Fight ("Doctor"/"Professor"/"Lawyer" cuts) with no "Dawn" entry. Replaced with the official channel's (GRAVITY COMMUNICATIONS) "Lawyer_15s" cut of the same case, confirmed consistent with the "Lawyer" cut on the director's channel (9uJV8x3Foq4, director: York Cheng)
works.desc_zh: 為經典大型 IP《仙境傳說：初心之戰》執導廣告（律師篇），官方頻道累積超過 28 萬觀看。
works.desc_en: Directed an ad ("Lawyer" cut) for the classic large-scale IP Ragnarok Online: The First Fight, drawing 280K+ views on its official channel.

works.views_note: 越南代理商官方頻道查無公開版本，僅導演個人頻道存檔（個位數觀看），available on request
works.views_note_en: No public version found on the Vietnamese publisher's official channel; only archived on the director's personal channel (single-digit views) — available on request
works.desc_zh: 為手遊《開天》執導廣告，由林志穎代言，並延伸越南在地化版本（越南版遊戲名：Kiếm Chỉ Giang Hồ: Khai Thiên）。
works.desc_en: Directed advertising for the mobile game Kaitian (Heaven's Gate), featuring endorser Jimmy Lin, including a localized Vietnamese version.

works.views_note: Com2uS 台灣官方頻道查無獨立公開版本，僅導演個人頻道存檔，available on request
works.views_note_en: No standalone public version found on Com2uS Taiwan's official channel; only archived on the director's personal channel — available on request
works.desc_zh: 為國際知名手遊《魔靈召喚》（Com2uS）執導台語版廣告。
works.desc_en: Directed a Taiwanese-dialect ad for the internationally known mobile game Summoners War (Com2uS).

works.views_note: 本篇單支影片 10.2萬觀看；同系列「震撼登場」全 8 支官方影片合計超過 290 萬觀看
works.views_note_en: This single cut has drawn 102K views; the full "Shocking Debut" series of 8 official videos has drawn a combined 2.9M+ views
works.desc_zh: 為國際大作《失落的方舟》（Amazon Games）執導廣告，官方系列影片合計觀看數超過 290 萬。
works.desc_en: Directed advertising for the major title Lost Ark (Amazon Games); the official campaign series has drawn a combined 2.9M+ views.

works.title_zh: 問劍長生 開服主題曲 MV
works.views_note: 鄭又勛導演作品頻道查無對應影片，無法依導演頻道說明欄核實執導身分；官方頻道版本觀看數不顯示，available on request 待客戶/case資料查證
works.views_note_en: No matching video found on York Cheng's director channel, so directing credit could not be verified via the channel description; the official-channel version's view count is not shown — available on request, pending client/case verification
works.desc_zh: 為手遊《問劍長生》執導開服主題曲 MV，官方頻道累積超過 25 萬觀看。
works.desc_en: Directed the launch theme MV for the mobile game Wenjian Changsheng, drawing 250K+ views on its official channel.

works.views_note: 原配對誤植為競品版本（林志穎、坤達、鳳小岳三人合演的官方TVC，108萬觀看，非本案）。已依鄭又勛導演作品頻道 cX7d8eiJfz8 說明欄核實：導演鄭又勛／代言人林志穎（僅一人）；查無對應的官方高觀看版本，故觀看數不顯示，available on request
works.views_note_en: The original pairing mislabeled a competing version (an official TVC co-starring Jimmy Lin, Kunda, and Rhydian Vaughan, 1.08M views — not this case). Verified via York Cheng's director channel description for cX7d8eiJfz8: director York Cheng, single endorser Jimmy Lin only; no matching high-view official version was found, so the view count is not shown — available on request
works.desc_zh: 為經典武俠 IP《天龍八部2》執導廣告，由林志穎代言（依導演頻道說明欄核實，非坊間流傳的三人版）。
works.desc_en: Directed the commercial for classic wuxia IP Tian Long Ba Bu 2, featuring endorser Jimmy Lin (verified via the director's own channel description; not the widely-circulated three-endorser cut).

works.title_en: Pai Dui Bu Shou Kong (mobile game)
works.views_note: 鄭又勛導演作品頻道查無對應影片，無法依導演頻道說明欄核實執導身分；官方頻道版本觀看數不顯示，available on request 待客戶/case資料查證
works.views_note_en: No matching video found on York Cheng's director channel, so directing credit could not be verified via the channel description; the official-channel version's view count is not shown — available on request, pending client/case verification
works.desc_zh: 為手遊《派對不獸控》執導事前預約廣告。
works.desc_en: Directed a pre-registration campaign ad for the mobile game Pai Dui Bu Shou Kong.

works.title_zh: 2019 英雄聯盟 LMS 夏季賽片頭
works.title_en: League of Legends LMS 2019 Summer Split — Title Sequence
works.views_note: 找不到賽事主辦官方頻道獨立公開版本，僅導演個人頻道存檔；推測真實曝光是透過賽事直播本身，available on request
works.views_note_en: No standalone public version found on the tournament organizer's official channel; only archived on the director's personal channel — actual exposure was likely via the tournament livestream itself, available on request
works.desc_zh: 為英雄聯盟 LMS 2019 夏季賽監製賽事片頭（依導演頻道說明欄，此案為監製作品，非導演作品）。
works.desc_en: Produced the tournament title sequence for the League of Legends LMS 2019 Summer Split (credited as producer, per the channel's own description, rather than director, on this particular piece).

brands: RO 仙境傳說：初心之戰
